DECLARATION OF MARK EPSTEIN IN REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO RELEASE MECHANIC'S LIENS FILED BY PETITIONER MORGESE, RICHARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RICHARD MORGESE'S PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS' LIEN. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE RELIEF REQUESTED IN THE PETITION IS MOOT AS A CONSEQUENCE OF THE RELEASE OF THE LIEN. FOR THAT REASON, THERE IS NO BASIS TO AWARD FEES. THE RESPONDENT IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
